---
name: Documentation
about: Report missing, unclear, or incorrect documentation
title: "[Docs] "
labels: documentation
assignees: ""
---

## Where

Which file/page? (e.g. `README.md`, `docs/ARCHITECTURE.md`, an ADR, a
godoc comment, the REST API examples)

## What's wrong or missing

Describe the problem: incorrect, outdated, unclear, or absent.

## Suggested fix

If you already know what the docs should say, put it here — even a rough
draft is welcome and can be turned into a PR.
